debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝² : CompleteLattice α
inst✝¹ : DistribLattice α
inst✝ : BoundedOrder α
S : Set α
R : @refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S
⊢ ⊥ ∉ @decomposition_of_refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S R

proof:
intro h
  simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  exact R.bot_not_mem D hD hD'
failed_attempts:
intro h
  rw [decomposition_of_refinement] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  exact R.bot_not_mem D hD hD'
successful_attempts:
intro h
  simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h
  exact R.bot_not_mem D hD hD'

simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]
  intro h
  obtain ⟨D, hD, hbot⟩ := h
  exact R.bot_not_mem D hD hbot
